description: Style Note Every girl needs a choice of kurtas in her off-duty wardrobe. aneri considers the street fads that are trending currently and adds it to their latest collection of kurtas. This stylish piece remains ethnic in its cut and silhouette but references contemporary design details to create unique fusion wear. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris. Product Details White kurta made of blended fabric, has a split neckline, is sleevesless with contrast piping on the armholes, embroidery and mirror work on the front and a curved hem with contrast panelling on the hem Material and Care Blended fabric Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Model Statistics The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M White kurta made of blended fabric, has a split neckline, is sleevesless with contrast piping on the armholes, embroidery and mirror work on the front and a curved hem with contrast panelling on the hem
